success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-based adapter strategy was feasible (import_feasibility 0.93), reducing integration friction for a Python library project.
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio transport, indicating baseline runtime viability.
Repository has clear modular package structure (core/defect/load/dump/lammps/tools), enabling tool mapping.
No runtime pipeline errors/warnings were reported, and security scan reported zero known vulnerabilities in this run.
failure_reasons: Quality signal inconsistency: original project tests are marked passed=false while coverage is reported as 100% with execution_time=0, indicating test instrumentation/reporting gap.
DeepWiki enrichment failed, reducing external contextual analysis depth.
Generated metadata appears incomplete/inconsistent (tool_endpoints=0 while service lists 23 endpoints; total_lines_of_code=0).

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repo imported via zip fallback (243 files). Fallback worked but may be slower/less reproducible than direct VCS clone.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed with medium complexity findings and strong import feasibility; DeepWiki sub-step failed but did not block pipeline.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation completed and produced expected MCP scaffold files and endpoint surface; metadata counters suggest post-generation metrics collection issue.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin health test passed (healthy startup, stdio). Original project test status is unreliable due to contradictory metrics (passed=false, coverage=100%, time=0).

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown/insufficient telemetry (reported 0 MB). Add real memory instrumentation.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown/insufficient telemetry (reported 0%). Add per-node CPU profiling.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate for generated artifacts (7 files). Source repo includes committed docs/static assets that increase checkout footprint.
